creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
Seems it just needs a bit of love and more memory to get the thing to build : 

hydra# poudriere bulk -j current -p default graphics/librsvg2-rust

However the update to 2.57 still stands :)

Special thank you out to the incredible RhodiumToad !
